2026-05-01T20:05:19.2334392Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-05-01T20:05:19.2335343Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-05-01T20:05:19.2335775Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-05-01T20:05:19.2336125Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m

2026-05-01T20:08:25.9143585Z ✓ $ cd /home/runner/work/SkiaSharp/SkiaSharp/externals/skia && git fetch origin 2>/dev/null; git log --oneline origin/skiasharp -5; echo "Submodule HEAD: $(git rev-parse HEAD)"
2026-05-01T20:08:25.9144994Z 
2026-05-01T20:08:25.9146154Z ◆ The submodule HEAD is `6f8139adf7` which IS the latest on `origin/skiasharp`. The cgmanifest has `e09e6c1349c2e1ba` which must be from a previous state and is likely stale.
2026-05-01T20:08:25.9147381Z   
2026-05-01T20:08:25.9147687Z   So the current situation:
2026-05-01T20:08:25.9148173Z   - mono/skia `skiasharp` branch: `6f8139adf7` (m147 merge)
2026-05-01T20:08:25.9148812Z   - SkiaSharp parent `externals/skia`: `6f8139adf7` (matches)
2026-05-01T20:08:25.9149423Z   - SkiaSharp parent `main`: already has m147 merged
2026-05-01T20:08:25.9149936Z   
2026-05-01T20:08:25.9151061Z   The task asks to update from m147 to m147. Since the `skiasharp` branch in mono/skia has already merged m147, and SkiaSharp's `main` already reflects this, **there is truly nothing to do**.
2026-05-01T20:08:25.9152335Z   
2026-05-01T20:08:25.9152610Z   
2026-05-01T20:08:25.9154362Z   The `autobump/skia-m147` branch workflow is just tracking the current milestone, which we're already at, so this should be a no-op. There's a discrepancy between the cgmanifest commit hash and the submodule HEAD that might need addressing, but that's separate from the actual task at hand.
2026-05-01T20:08:25.9156576Z

2026-05-01T20:08:25.9157977Z
